text: Moving from a quiet, stark hallway to this lively, colorful installation, I feel my thoughts shift. The first space felt sterile and isolated; almost as if I was anticipating the unknown. Here, surrounded by words, screens, and deliberate design, I feel curious and energized. The presence of R+D—research and development—sparks reflection: I am witnessing innovation, the merging of human and machine. Yet I wonder, do I truly belong amidst all this artifice, or am I only a visitor in the ongoing dialogue between technology and humanity?
